page_content: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Seasoned Technical Lead with 9+ years of experience in designing, developing, and scaling distributed systems and cloud-native applications. Adept at technical leadership, system architecture, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact software products. Expertise in .NET Core, Microservices, Kubernetes, GCP, and Azure. Proven success in mentoring engineers, driving system performance, and aligning technical strategy with business goals

. API design and implementation Microservices design React development Software unit testing Resource optimization strategies Redis database management Cross-Functional Collaboration Mentoring & Team Building Scalability & Performance Optimization Docker & Kubernetes CI/CD Automation Cloud-Native Development (GCP, Azure) System & Solution Design RAHUL SHARMA Tech Lead Engineer Architected and led the development of high-availability automotive backend systems to support 50M+ leads

. • Spearheaded migration to microservices and containerized deployments on GCP, increasing reliability and reducing downtime. • Implemented scalable, customer-centric incentive engines improving OEM budget efficiency. • Mentored a team of 6+ engineers, led sprint planning, and improved delivery velocity by 30%. • Integrated Elastic APM and monitoring for end-to-end observability and incident response. • Led architecture reviews, system audits, and cloud cost optimization initiatives. • Re-architected resume-builder applications used across Zety, MyPerfectResume, and LiveCareer. • Developed scalable APIs using .NET Core and Azure Storage for mobile and web clients. • Increased paid user conversion by 500% through payment gateway integration and system optimization. •
